economic_notes: First Nation holds a limited partnership investment in Swift Current Casino ($60,000). CMHC Phases 1-10 consolidated. O.K. Creek Radio Station Inc. consolidated. Bison inventory maintained.
notes: Capital purchases in 2020 were $2,583,800 including Family Support Home under construction ($1,702,868). Capital purchases and disposals line shows a credit of ($2,583,800) in expenses. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $6,475,408 + Health Canada $533,153 + File Hills Qu'Appelle Tribal Council $114,569 + File Hills Health $19,394 + CMHC $234525 = $7,377,049 plus First Nations Trust $226,362 adjusted for trust fund increase of $1,228. OSR includes Rentals $661,850 and Other $557,016 minus trust increase. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $1,008,402 to $2,112,902. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages.
